hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】随着美联储制定新方针，沃什面临多种替代通胀迹象；【AI】惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系；【FINANCE】特朗普称他已成为“加密货币大佬”后，比特币反弹。

items.title: Warsh faces multiple alternative inflation signs as Fed charts new course
items.summary: Warsh has said that inflation is a "choice." The same could also be true of how inflation is measured.
items.title_zh: 随着美联储制定新方针，沃什面临多种替代通胀迹象
items.summary_zh: 沃什曾表示，通货膨胀是一种“选择”。通货膨胀的衡量方式也可能如此。

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.
items.title_zh: 惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: HP Inc. 扩大其 OpenAI Frontier 合作伙伴关系，在客户体验、软件开发和企业运营领域部署 AI。

items.title: Bitcoin rebounds after Trump says he's become 'a big crypto guy'
items.summary: Earlier, bitcoin fell toward $60,000 after Strategy disclosed the sale of more of its holdings of the token.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称他已成为“加密货币大佬”后，比特币反弹
items.summary_zh: 早些时候，在 Strategy 披露出售更多所持代币后，比特币跌至 60,000 美元。

items.title: Bitcoin's U.S. reserve still a work-in-progress as federal agencies hash it out
items.summary: The White House says it's still evaluating the "best structure" for the federal fund to hold bitcoin as a long-term reserve and a separate stockpile of other crypto assets.
items.title_zh: 随着联邦机构的讨论，比特币的美国储备仍在进行中
items.summary_zh: 白宫表示，仍在评估联邦基金持有比特币作为长期储备和其他加密资产的单独储备的“最佳结构”。

items.title: Bitcoin's recent macro relief faces a challenge from Japanese interest rates
items.summary: Japanese bond yields continue to rise, lifting their U.S. counterparts and posing a potential headwind for risk assets.
items.title_zh: 比特币近期的宏观缓解面临日本利率的挑战
items.summary_zh: 日本债券收益率继续上升，带动美国债券收益率上涨，并对风险资产构成潜在阻力。

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin and ether ETFs drew inflows on Monday
items.summary: Spot bitcoin ETFs still lost a net $526.6 million over the shortened holiday week, an eighth straight week of negative flows.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：比特币和以太坊 ETF 周一吸引资金流入
items.summary_zh: 在缩短的假期周内，现货比特币 ETF 仍净损失 5.266 亿美元，这是连续第八周出现负流量。

items.title: Bitcoin drops after a run at $64,000, shrugging off Strategy's $213 million BTC sale
items.summary: The token touched $64,400 overnight before easing back, still up about 6% on the week. A fresh missile strike on a Qatari gas ship in the Strait of Hormuz lifted oil and tested the late-June peace deal as Asian tech sold off again.
items.title_zh: 比特币冲至 64,000 美元后下跌，摆脱了 Strategy 2.13 亿美元的 BTC 销售影响
items.summary_zh: 该代币隔夜触及 64,400 美元，随后回落，本周仍上涨约 6%。随着亚洲科技再次抛售，霍尔木兹海峡的一艘卡塔尔天然气船遭受新的导弹袭击，石油产量增加，并测试了 6 月底的和平协议。

items.title: Strategy selling hundreds of millions worth of bitcoin raises question about its capital-allocation playbook
items.summary: First, it was a tiny amount of bitcoin sales; then, the purchase of several thousand BTC; and finally, today, the unloading of thousands of BTC. What's happening at Strategy?
items.title_zh: 出售价值数亿比特币的策略引发了对其资本配置策略的质疑
items.summary_zh: 首先，这是少量的比特币销售；然后，购买几千个BTC；最后，今天，数千个比特币被抛售。战略部发生了什么？

items.title: Ethereum developers embrace Vitalik Buterin's long-term vision but urge quicker execution
items.summary: The "Lean Ethereum" strawmap, updated earlier this week, has gained support from many of the network's researchers, though several say the biggest challenge won't be deciding what to build, but how quickly it can happen.
items.title_zh: 以太坊开发者拥护 Vitalik Buterin 的长期愿景，但敦促加快执行速度
items.summary_zh: 本周早些时候更新的“精益以太坊”草图已经获得了许多网络研究人员的支持，尽管一些人表示最大的挑战不是决定构建什么，而是它能以多快的速度发生。

items.title: Two traders sue Polymarket over disputed resolution of Strategy bitcoin sale market
items.summary: Plaintiffs allege Polymarket wrongly resolved the market as "No" despite Strategy's SEC filing disclosing it sold 32 BTC between May 26 and May 31.
items.title_zh: 两名交易员就 Strategy 比特币销售市场的争议解决方案起诉 Polymarket
items.summary_zh: 原告指控 Polymarket 错误地将市场判定为“否”，尽管 Strategy 向 SEC 提交的文件显示其在 5 月 26 日至 5 月 31 日期间出售了 32 BTC。

items.title: What Is the U.S. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve?
items.summary: The U.S. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve is a government-held stockpile of bitcoin, established by executive order in March 2025. The order treats Bitcoin as a long-term reserve asset, comparable to how the country holds gold, and directs that the coins placed in the reserve are not to
items.title_zh: 美国的比特币战略储备是什么？
items.summary_zh: 美国战略比特币储备是政府持有的比特币储备，由 2025 年 3 月的行政命令设立。该命令将比特币视为一种长期储备资产，类似于该国持有黄金的方式，并指示存放在储备中的比特币不得用于其他用途。

items.title: Grayscale says Strategy’s recent bitcoin sales should restore confidence in its financing structure
items.summary: "Strategy is selling more bitcoin. But this will restore confidence in its financing structure and help bitcoin find a more durable bottom."
items.title_zh: Grayscale 表示 Strategy 最近的比特币销售应该会恢复对其融资结构的信心
items.summary_zh: “策略是出售更多比特币。但这将恢复对其融资结构的信心，并帮助比特币找到更持久的底部。”

items.title: President Trump’s strategic bitcoin reserve hits a legal and jurisdictional snag: Bloomberg
items.summary: President Trump's plans for a strategic bitcoin reserve are hitting a legal and jurisdictional snag, according to reporting from Bloomberg.
items.title_zh: 特朗普总统的比特币战略储备遇到法律和司法障碍：彭博社
items.summary_zh: 据彭博社报道，特朗普总统的比特币战略储备计划遇到了法律和司法方面的障碍。

items.title: AVAX One launches CEO search after leader of its Avalanche treasury pivot steps down
items.summary: SkyBridge founder Anthony Scaramucci backed AVAX One's $550 million Avalanche treasury strategy announced last year.
items.title_zh: AVAX One 在 Avalanche 财务支点领导人辞职后启动首席执行官搜寻
items.summary_zh: SkyBridge 创始人 Anthony Scaramucci 支持 AVAX One 去年宣布的 5.5 亿美元 Avalanche 财务战略。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: Klarna seeks U.S. bank charter in latest push beyond buy now, pay later
items.summary: Klarna joins a wave of fintech and crypto firms seeking entry to the traditional banking system.
items.title_zh: 克拉纳寻求美国银行牌照，以超越“先买后付”的最新举措
items.summary_zh: Klarna 加入了寻求进入传统银行系统的金融科技和加密货币公司浪潮。

items.title: Citadel's hedge funds post broad first-half gains, top performing strategy sidesteps quant selloff
items.summary: The hedge fund firm's tactical trading fund, which combines discretionary equity investing with quantitative strategies, climbed 14.3% through the end of June.
items.title_zh: Citadel 的对冲基金上半年大幅上涨，表现最佳的策略避开了量化抛售
items.summary_zh: 这家对冲基金公司的战术交易基金将全权委托股票投资与量化策略相结合，截至 6 月底上涨了 14.3%。

items.title: Prolific tech analyst Dan Ives is exiting Wedbush for a new venture
items.summary: Ives said the new firm will seek to build what he described as a "modern merchant bank."
items.title_zh: 多产科技分析师丹·艾夫斯 (Dan Ives) 即将离开韦德布什 (Wedbush) 前往一家新公司
items.summary_zh: 艾夫斯表示，新公司将寻求建立他所说的“现代商业银行”。

items.title: Inflation peaked in May as energy prices fell in June, Kalshi traders think
items.summary: Speculators on the prediction market platform give less than 30% odds to inflation peaking above 4.2% in 2026.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为，随着能源价格在 6 月份下跌，通胀在 5 月份达到顶峰
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的投机者认为，2026 年通胀率达到 4.2% 以上峰值的可能性不到 30%。

items.title: Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review Balogun ban
items.summary: President Donald Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review United States striker Folarin Balogun's one-match suspension at the World Cup.
items.title_zh: 特朗普证实他要求国际足联审查巴洛贡禁令
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统证实，他要求国际足联审查美国前锋福拉林·巴洛贡在世界杯上停赛一场的决定。

items.title: Erika Kirk comes face-to-face in court with husband's alleged killer
items.summary: Charlie Kirk's widow was joined by the late US activist's family - all of whom attended court for the first time in the case.
items.title_zh: 埃里卡·柯克在法庭上与杀害丈夫的凶手面对面
items.summary_zh: 查理·柯克的遗孀与已故美国活动家的家人一起出席，他们都是此案首次出庭。

items.title: Wildfire in southern France forces evacuation of 10,000 people
items.summary: Tour de France organisers ban spectators from stage three as a wildfire hits the Pyrénées-Orientales region.
items.title_zh: 法国南部山火迫使10,000人疏散
items.summary_zh: 由于野火袭击东比利牛斯地区，环法自行车赛组织者禁止观众观看第三赛段。

items.title: At Least 15 Dead in China After Severe Flooding During Typhoon Maysak
items.summary: Videos showed inundated roads, farmland and buildings, and floodwaters rushing toward homes, while the region braced for a potential super typhoon this week.
items.title_zh: 台风“美莎克”期间中国发生严重洪水，造成至少15人死亡
items.summary_zh: 视频显示，道路、农田和建筑物被淹没，洪水冲向房屋，而该地区本周正准备迎接潜在的超强台风。

items.title: Trump’s Intervention in Balogun’s World Cup Suspension Adds to Conflict With Europe
items.summary: The decision to reverse a one-game ban landed badly in Europe, at a moment of already-heightened geopolitical tension with the United States.
items.title_zh: 特朗普干预巴洛贡世界杯暂停加剧与欧洲的冲突
items.summary_zh: 在与美国的地缘政治紧张局势已经加剧之际，扭转一场比赛禁令的决定在欧洲遭遇了糟糕的结果。

items.title: XRP stalls near $1.14 as breakout attempt struggles for volume
items.summary: Buyers defended the session lows and pushed XRP back toward resistance, but muted overall volume left traders waiting for confirmation above $1.13-$1.14.
items.title_zh: 由于成交量难以突破，XRP 徘徊在 1.14 美元附近
items.summary_zh: 买家捍卫了盘中低点，并将 XRP 推回阻力位，但总体成交量较低，交易者等待 1.13-1.14 美元上方的确认。

items.title: Circle’s USDC is leaving Tether behind in the stablecoin volume race, new data from Visa shows
items.summary: As Wall Street banks adopt digital currencies for faster settlements, overall trading volume spiked 63% in just a single month.
items.title_zh: Visa 的新数据显示，Circle 的 USDC 在稳定币交易量竞赛中将 Tether 抛在了后面
items.summary_zh: 随着华尔街银行采用数字货币进行更快的结算，整体交易量在短短一个月内飙升了 63%。

items.title: Vitalik Buterin proposes ‘Extremely Lean’ Ethereum, shrinking the chain to near-zero state with ZK proofs
items.summary: Buterin outlined a two-step plan to shift Ethereum's state management to validators and replace per-epoch balance updates with ZK proofs.
items.title_zh: Vitalik Buterin 提出“极度精益”以太坊，通过 ZK 证明将链缩小到接近于零的状态
items.summary_zh: Buterin 概述了一个分两步走的计划，将以太坊的状态管理转移给验证者，并用 ZK 证明取代每个纪元的余额更新。

items.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
items.summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.
items.title_zh: 核心转储流行病学：修复 18 年前的错误
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 工程师使用大规模核心转储分析来调试罕见的基础设施崩溃，发现硬件故障和长期存在的软件错误。

items.title: PRX Part 4: Our Data Strategy
items.title_zh: PRX 第 4 部分：我们的数据策略

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Toward a future that preserves benefits of neurotechnology for all
items.summary: PhD student Rachel Sava, winner of the Envisioning the Future of Computing Prize, explores transformative improvements and dystopian risks of neural technology.
items.title_zh: 迈向一个让所有人都能受益于神经技术的未来
items.summary_zh: 博士生 Rachel Sava 是“展望计算未来”奖的获得者，她探索了神经技术的变革性改进和反乌托邦风险。

items.title: In NATO’s Next Act, Can Europe Play the Leading Role?
items.summary: The focus at a leaders’ summit in Turkey this week will be on building a new model for the alliance, as President Trump pushes to do less and pressures others do more.
items.title_zh: 北约下一步行动中，欧洲能否发挥主导作用？
items.summary_zh: 本周在土耳其举行的领导人峰会的重点将是建立联盟的新模式，特朗普总统将推动减少行动，并迫使其他国家采取更多行动。

items.title: Russia Strikes Kyiv, Ukraine’s Capital, on Eve of NATO Summit
items.summary: Ballistic missiles were fired into the capital of Ukraine as Russia launched its second major attack in less than a week. At least 16 people were killed, officials said.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯在北约峰会前夕袭击乌克兰首都基辅
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯在不到一周内发动了第二次重大袭击，弹道导弹袭击了乌克兰首都。官员称，至少有 16 人死亡。

items.title: China Test Fires Long-Range Ballistic Missile in the Pacific
items.summary: China’s firing of a submarine-launched missile came as Australia secured more defense deals with Pacific Island nations. Countries expressed concern about the test.
items.title_zh: 中国在太平洋试射远程弹道导弹
items.summary_zh: 中国发射潜射导弹之际，澳大利亚与太平洋岛国达成了更多防务协议。各国对此次测试表示担忧。

items.title: Binance taps into Bitcoin holders’ hunger for yield with new covered call yield play
items.summary: The product, called BTC Yield, is designed exclusively for people who already hold bitcoin.
items.title_zh: 币安通过新的备兑看涨期权收益玩法，满足了比特币持有者对收益的渴望
items.summary_zh: 该产品名为 BTC Yield，专为已经持有比特币的人设计。

items.title: President Trump says he’s a ‘big crypto guy,’ while distancing himself from family’s crypto ventures
items.summary: President Trump called cryptocurrency "powerful" during the launch of Trump investment accounts for children.
items.title_zh: 特朗普总统称他是“加密货币大佬”，同时与家族的加密货币企业保持距离
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统在推出特朗普儿童投资账户期间称加密货币“强大”。

items.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
items.summary: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.
items.title_zh: GeneBench-Pro 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GeneBench-Pro，这是一个使用复杂的真实数据集测试基因组学、生物学和科学研究中人工智能性能的新基准。

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
items.title_zh: 预览 GPT-5.6 Sol：下一代模型
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 预览了 GPT-5.6 Sol，这是一种下一代模型，在编码、科学和网络安全方面具有更强的能力，并配有最先进的安全堆栈。

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
items.title_zh: 客服人员如何改变工作方式
items.summary_zh: 一篇新的 OpenAI 研究论文展示了人工智能代理如何改变工作方式，实现更长、更复杂的任务，并提高跨角色的生产力。

items.title: 🤗 Kernels: Major Updates
items.title_zh: 🤗 内核：主要更新

items.title: Featuring Every Eval Ever Results on Hugging Face Model Pages
items.title_zh: 在拥抱脸部模型页面上展示所有评估结果

items.title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
items.title_zh: 使用 NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 加速 Transformer 微调

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 2026 年 6 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 6 月起最新的 AI 更新。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: LLMs help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
items.summary: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.
items.title_zh: 法学硕士帮助机器人理解模糊的指令并专注于关键细节
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等地方做家务，麻省理工学院的一种新方法使用一种语言模型来澄清用户的指令，然后使用另一种语言模型来忽略不相关的信息。

items.title: Exploring the societal impacts of AI
items.summary: During the AI and Society Forum, leading MIT researchers examined critical questions about AI’s influence on employment and democracy.
items.title_zh: 探索人工智能的社会影响
items.summary_zh: 在人工智能与社会论坛期间，麻省理工学院的主要研究人员研究了有关人工智能对就业和民主影响的关键问题。

items.title: The World Cup sends prediction market volumes soaring to record highs
items.summary: Trading volumes on Kalshi and Polymarket both hit record highs in June. Rothera, a new prediction market platform, was also able to manage $2 billion in volume.
items.title_zh: 世界杯使得预测市场量飙升至历史新高
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 和 Polymarket 的交易量在 6 月份均创下历史新高。新的预测市场平台 Rothera 也能够管理 20 亿美元的交易量。

items.title: Don't throw away your shot to speak to an AI Alexander Hamilton at Boston's new finance museum
items.summary: Nearly a decade after leaving its former home, the Museum of American Finance is opening its new doors to the public.
items.title_zh: 不要放弃在波士顿新金融博物馆与人工智能亚历山大·汉密尔顿交谈的机会
items.summary_zh: 离开旧址近十年后，美国金融博物馆向公众敞开了新的大门。

items.title: SpaceX may emerge as ultimate blueprint for new wave of mega-cap IPOs
items.summary: "It would not surprise me at all to see a similar dynamic play out with some of these [IPOs] set to come in the months ahead," the Kathmere Capital CIO says.
items.title_zh: SpaceX可能成为新一波大型IPO的最终蓝图
items.summary_zh: Kathmere Capital 首席信息官表示：“如果在未来几个月内看到其中一些 [IPO] 出现类似的动态，我一点也不感到惊讶。”

items.title: Alibaba-affiliate Ant Group rushes into humanoid robots with a dozen deals in 18 months
items.summary: Ant has led a 500 million yuan ($73.59 million) funding round in humanoid robotics company Zeroth, the start-up announced Thursday.
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴旗下蚂蚁集团在 18 个月内完成十几笔交易，进军人形机器人领域
items.summary_zh: 仿人机器人公司 Zeroth 周四宣布，蚂蚁金服已领投该公司一轮 5 亿元人民币（7359 万美元）的融资。

items.title: Zelensky to press Nato for air defence systems after intense Russian strikes
items.summary: The Ukrainian president will use the Nato meeting in Turkey to argue he needs more interceptor missiles.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯猛烈袭击后泽连斯基敦促北约提供防空系统
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰总统将利用在土耳其举行的北约会议来表明他需要更多拦截导弹。

items.title: Jailers and officials at Russia's 'torture prisons' in Ukraine exposed by BBC
items.summary: Former prisoners accuse the men of abuse in detention centres and want to see them brought to trial.
items.title_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 曝光俄罗斯在乌克兰“酷刑监狱”的狱卒和官员
items.summary_zh: 前囚犯指控这些人在拘留中心实施虐待，并希望看到他们受到审判。

items.title: Marine Le Pen's moment of truth: Why Tuesday court verdict matters for France
items.summary: The leader of France's National Rally leads the opinion polls ahead of the 2027 presidential election and will now find out if she can stand.
items.title_zh: 玛丽娜·勒庞的关键时刻：为什么周二法院的判决对法国很重要
items.summary_zh: 法国全国集会领袖在 2027 年总统选举前的民意调查中领先，现在将看看她是否能参选。

items.title: Watch: Moment rare tornado lashes central Chinese cities
items.summary: Videos shared with the BBC show debris flying through the air as the storm swept through Ezhou and Huanggang in Hubei province.
items.title_zh: 观看：罕见的龙卷风袭击中国中部城市
items.summary_zh: 与英国广播公司分享的视频显示，风暴席卷湖北省鄂州和黄冈时，碎片在空中飞舞。

items.title: Resistance and revenge - Iran wanted to send a message with its farewell to Khamenei
items.summary: Three days of public mourning in Tehran was a political spectacle Iran's leaders wanted the world to see, writes the BBC's international correspondent Lyse Doucet.
items.title_zh: 抵抗与报复——伊朗想通过告别哈梅内伊传递一个信息
items.summary_zh: BBC 国际记者 Lyse Doucet 写道，德黑兰为期三天的公众哀悼是伊朗领导人希望全世界看到的政治奇观。

items.title: India's landmark Ram temple overhauls board after alleged theft of donations
items.summary: Questions have been raised over alleged theft of cash, valuable jewellery, gold and silver offered by devotees.
items.title_zh: 印度地标性建筑拉姆神庙因涉嫌盗窃捐款而对董事会进行大修
items.summary_zh: 人们对信徒提供的现金、贵重珠宝、金银的涉嫌盗窃行为提出了质疑。

items.title: Ex-Syrian intelligence chief found guilty of torture and sexual abuse by Austrian court
items.summary: Two former Syrian officials went on trial in Vienna, Austria, accused of crimes against opponents of former Syrian leader Bashar al-Assad
items.title_zh: 奥地利法院判定前叙利亚情报局长犯有酷刑和性虐待罪
items.summary_zh: 两名前叙利亚官员在奥地利维也纳接受审判，被指控对叙利亚前领导人巴沙尔·阿萨德的反对者犯有罪行

items.title: Joining a Human Tide of Mourners Flowing Through Tehran’s Streets
items.summary: After days of public mourning ceremonies in the Iranian capital, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei’s coffin arrived in Tehran’s Azadi Square. This is what I saw covering the miles-long procession on Monday.
items.title_zh: 加入德黑兰街道上的哀悼者大潮
items.summary_zh: 在伊朗首都举行了几天的公众哀悼仪式后，阿亚图拉·阿里·哈梅内伊的灵柩抵达德黑兰的自由广场。这就是我周一在长达数英里的游行中看到的情况。

items.title: A Long-Awaited Verdict for Marine Le Pen Could Reshape France’s Politics
items.summary: A court will decide on Tuesday whether to uphold Ms. Le Pen’s embezzlement conviction. If it does, the far-right leader will probably be barred from running for the presidency next year.
items.title_zh: 对马琳·勒庞的期待已久的判决可能会重塑法国政治
items.summary_zh: 法院将于周二决定是否维持勒庞贪污罪的定罪。如果确实如此，这位极右翼领导人可能会被禁止明年竞选总统。

items.title: Turkey Hosts NATO Summit While Cracking Down on Critics
items.summary: In the weeks leading up to the two-day event, the Turkish authorities blocked websites, jailed scores of people over allegations of terrorism and arrested a prominent comedian.
items.title_zh: 土耳其主办北约峰会，同时镇压批评者
items.summary_zh: 在为期两天的活动前几周，土耳其当局封锁了网站，因恐怖主义指控而监禁了数十人，并逮捕了一位著名喜剧演员。

items.title: With $8 Billion in Venezuelan Oil Money, U.S. Gives $300 Million in Quake Aid
items.summary: In 2010, there was a huge U.S. aid effort after a quake in Haiti. Today, U.S. officials say they oversee billions in Venezuelan oil revenue, but aid is less.
items.title_zh: 美国利用委内瑞拉80亿美元石油资金提供3亿美元地震援助
items.summary_zh: 2010年，海地发生地震后，美国提供了大量援助。如今，美国官员表示，他们监管着委内瑞拉数十亿美元的石油收入，但援助却较少。

items.title: Will Prince Harry’s Trip to Britain Repair or Deepen the Royal Rift?
items.summary: Harry arrived in London Monday night for a visit that has already been overshadowed by drama and confusion over his plans.
items.title_zh: 哈里王子的英国之行会修复还是加深王室裂痕？
items.summary_zh: 哈里周一晚上抵达伦敦，这次访问已经被他的计划中的戏剧性事件和混乱所笼罩。

items.title: BONK faces $20 million treasury drain after attacker spends $4 million to pass malicious proposal
items.summary: The attacker bought enough of the memecoin's tokens to pass a governance proposal that sent the group's holdings to a wallet they controlled, then began selling.
items.title_zh: 攻击者花费 400 万美元通过恶意提案后，BONK 面临 2000 万美元资金流失
items.summary_zh: 攻击者购买了足够的 memecoin 代币，以通过一项治理提案，将该组织所持的代币发送到他们控制的钱包中，然后开始出售。

items.title: Paradigm leads $5.5 million seed round in M1X Global to expand tokenized sovereign debt platform
items.summary: M1X Global, which worked with the Republic of the Marshall Islands on the issuance of the onchain sovereign bond USDM1, has raised funds.
items.title_zh: Paradigm 领投 M1X Global 550 万美元种子轮融资，以扩大代币化主权债务平台
items.summary_zh: M1X Global 与马绍尔群岛共和国合作发行链上主权债券 USDM1，已筹集资金。

items.title: BonkDAO loses $20 million following ‘malicious governance proposal’ attack
items.summary: The funds have been tracked to crypto exchanges, and South Korea-based Upbit said it has suspended BONK deposits and withdrawals.
items.title_zh: BonkDAO 在“恶意治理提案”攻击后损失 2000 万美元
items.summary_zh: 这些资金已被追踪至加密货币交易所，韩国 Upbit 表示已暂停 BONK 存款和取款。

items.title: Judge revives fraud claim against Barry Silbert, DCG in Genesis Yield lawsuit
items.summary: The class action centers on Genesis Yield, a lending program that let customers deposit crypto in exchange for interest payments.
items.title_zh: 法官在 Genesis Yield 诉讼中恢复针对 DCG 巴里·希尔伯特 (Barry Silbert) 的欺诈指控
items.summary_zh: 集体诉讼以 Genesis Yield 为中心，这是一项贷款计划，允许客户存入加密货币以换取利息。

items.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
items.summary: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 的采用范围如何扩大
items.summary_zh: 新的 OpenAI Signals 数据显示了 ChatGPT 在全球范围内的采用情况如何增长，用户使用量不断增加，探索更多功能，并推动跨地区和语言的增长。

items.title: Inside Genebench-Pro
items.title_zh: Genebench-Pro 内部

items.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
items.summary: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.
items.title_zh: 绘制欧洲人工智能劳动力机会图
items.summary_zh: 一份新的 OpenAI 报告描绘了人工智能如何重塑整个欧盟的就业机会，强调哪些职业可能面临自动化、增长或工作流程变化。

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 LLM 优化的推理芯片
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 Jalapeo，这是一款专为 LLM 推理而构建的定制 AI 芯片，旨在提高 AI 系统的性能、效率和规模。

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.
items.title_zh: 帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 Appia 基金会帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准，支持评估框架、安全实践和全球合作。

items.title: LeRobot v0.6.0: Imagine, Evaluate, Improve
items.title_zh: 乐机器人v0.6.0：想象、评估、改进

items.title: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
items.title_zh: Hugging Face 和 Cerebras 将 Gemma 4 引入实时语音 AI

items.title: ScarfBench: Benchmarking AI Agents for Enterprise Java Framework Migration
items.title_zh: ScarfBench：企业 Java 框架迁移的 AI 代理基准测试

items.title: Why Specialization Is Inevitable
items.title_zh: 为什么专业化是不可避免的

items.title: DiScoFormer: One transformer for density and score, across distributions
items.title_zh: DiScoFormer：一种跨分布的密度和分数转换器

items.title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
items.title_zh: 通过一个命令在 HF 作业上运行 vLLM 服务器

items.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.
items.title_zh: 开启英国的下一个生产力时代：建设一个人工智能开拓者的国家
items.summary_zh: 谷歌英国分享了最新的经济影响报告，以及如何让更多人享受到人工智能技术带来的好处。

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
items.title_zh: 问AI专家：全栈到底是什么？
items.summary_zh: 一位 Google 专家解释了采用全栈方法处理 AI 意味着什么，以及为什么它长期以来一直是我们 AI 工作的基础。

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
items.title_zh: 我们正在通过新的投资和社区支持来加强我们在阿拉巴马州的业务。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌宣布在 2026 年和 2027 年投资 15 亿美元，扩建其位于阿拉巴马州杰克逊县的数据中心园区。自 2019 年起在改造后的前…

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们在弗吉尼亚州的新社区投资支持当地就业并扩大能源负担能力。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: 5 ways Google Search can level up your thrift and vintage shopping
items.summary: Uncover second-hand scores with AI tools in Google Search and Shopping.
items.title_zh: Google 搜索提升您的旧货购物水平的 5 种方式
items.summary_zh: 使用 Google 搜索和购物中的 AI 工具发现二手乐谱。

items.title: MIT in the media: Innovating and educating for the next 250 years of America
items.summary: During a "Washington Post Live" panel discussion with ASU President Michael Crow, President Sally Kornbluth explored how universities are preparing the next generation of scientists to lead in America’s rapidly changing technological landscape.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：为美国未来 250 年进行创新和教育
items.summary_zh: 在与亚利桑那州立大学校长迈克尔·克劳 (Michael Crow) 举行的“华盛顿邮报直播”小组讨论中，校长萨莉·科恩布鲁斯 (Sally Kornbluth) 探讨了大学如何培养下一代科学家，以引领美国快速变化的技术格局。

items.title: Q&A: What is agentic AI today, and what do we want it to be?
items.summary: Computer scientist Phillip Isola cuts through the hype to explain how AI agents work and what the future might hold for this rapidly advancing technology.
items.title_zh: 问答：今天的代理人工智能是什么？我们希望它是什么？
items.summary_zh: 计算机科学家 Phillip Isola 打破了炒作，解释了人工智能代理的工作原理以及这项快速发展的技术的未来。

items.title: 3 Questions: Beyond data-driven aesthetics
items.summary: In a new Keller Gallery exhibition, Alexandros Haridis SM ’17, PhD ’22 traces centuries of ideas about aesthetic judgment and explores how design can make complex computational systems visible.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：超越数据驱动的美学
items.summary_zh: 在凯勒画廊的新展览中，Alexandros Haridis SM '17、PhD '22 追溯了几个世纪以来有关审美判断的想法，并探索了设计如何使复杂的计算系统变得可见。

items.title: MIT in the media: Exploring how curiosity-driven science is an essential ingredient in America’s success
items.summary: “Scientific American” showcases the history and future of America’s scientific engine, highlighting promising young scientists and icons at MIT and beyond.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：探索好奇心驱动的科学如何成为美国成功的重要因素
items.summary_zh: 《科学美国人》展示了美国科学引擎的历史和未来，重点关注麻省理工学院及其他地区有前途的年轻科学家和偶像。

items.title: Improving the speed and energy-efficiency of AI agents
items.summary: A new system, known as Murakkab, optimizes the design and deployment of multistep workflows that power AI applications.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能代理的速度和能源效率
items.summary_zh: 名为 Murakkab 的新系统优化了支持人工智能应用程序的多步骤工作流程的设计和部署。
